name: Palindrome Checker
description:
A palindrome is a word, phrase, number, or other sequence of characters which reads the same backward as forward. Typically, non-alphanumeric characters are ignored and case is disregarded.

This visualizer uses the Two-Pointer Technique:

  • Place one pointer at the start of the string.
  • Place another pointer at the end of the string.
  • Compare the characters at each pointer. If they match, move both pointers toward the middle.
  • If they don't match, the string is not a palindrome.
